market_overview.headline: Market showing broad bearish structure with both SPY and QQQ in unstacked bearish configurations despite recent bounce attempts.
market_overview.detail: Only 37% of top 300 stocks in Full Bull trend vs 31% in Full Bear, with major indices below key EMAs. BTC showing bear rally structure but still deeply oversold at -42.8% from fair value.

momentum_themes.headline: Tech Hardware and Memory Leading Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology sector showing explosive momentum with memory and optical networking stocks leading. Semiconductor equipment and data storage names posting massive spread scores above 15-30.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Dominates While Financials and Tech Services Struggle

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure with all 15 energy stocks in Full Bull uptrends
Small but perfectly aligned sector with all stocks showing bullish structure
Strong sector rotation into industrial services with 88% bulls vs only 6% bears

weakest.note: Tech services severely damaged with 82% bears and average -7.25% vs 21W EMA
Financial sector in broad bear structure with 80% bears despite some reversal candidates
Complete sector breakdown with all consumer durable stocks in bearish structure

sector_analysis.detail: Clear energy/commodity vs tech/finance rotation underway. Energy at perfect 100% bull while tech services and finance showing 60-80% bear ratios.

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ in bearish unstacked structure with potential for further downside acceleration
31% of top stocks in Full Bear vs only 37% Full Bull suggests broad market weakness persists
Major tech names like MSFT, META, AMZN all in Full Bear with -9% to -10% vs 21W EMA
Financial sector breakdown could spread to broader market if reversal candidates fail to hold
